playgroundItems.title: Brand Identity Spec
playgroundItems.description: Logo and brand identity exploration for a tech startup.
playgroundItems.details: Comprehensive brand identity package including primary logo, secondary marks, color palette, typography system, and application examples. Created for a fintech client exploring their visual direction.
playgroundItems.imageAlt: Brand identity mockup showing logo variations

playgroundItems.title: Social Campaign Assets
playgroundItems.description: Multi-platform social media campaign assets for fashion brand.
playgroundItems.details: Complete social media campaign including Instagram posts, stories, Facebook covers, and LinkedIn banners. Optimized for each platform's specifications while maintaining brand consistency.

playgroundItems.title: Liquid Morphism
playgroundItems.description: Blobby organic shapes that morph and merge using SVG filters.
playgroundItems.details: Uses SVG feTurbulence and feDisplacementMap filters to create organic distortion. The morphing is achieved through layered animations with different timing functions.

playgroundItems.title: Product Motion Loop
playgroundItems.description: After Effects loop showcasing product animation techniques.
playgroundItems.details: Created in After Effects using shape layers, trim paths, and expression-based animations. Features seamless looping with easing and motion blur for a premium feel.

playgroundItems.title: Gradient Orbs
playgroundItems.description: Floating gradient orbs with blend modes creating dynamic color interactions.
playgroundItems.details: Multiple radial gradients positioned absolutely with varying blend modes. CSS custom properties control orb size and position.

playgroundItems.title: Event Poster Series
playgroundItems.description: Poster design series for music and arts festival.
playgroundItems.details: A series of event posters exploring different visual styles for a multi-genre music festival. Each poster uses distinct typography and color theory to represent different artist vibes.

playgroundItems.title: Logo Motion Reel
playgroundItems.description: Animated logo showreel featuring various brand reveals.
playgroundItems.details: Compilation of logo animations created for client projects. Features kinetic typography, morphing transitions, and 3D elements. Rendered at 60fps for smooth playback.

playgroundItems.title: Noise Texture Generator
playgroundItems.description: Interactive noise texture generator with real-time parameter controls.
playgroundItems.details: Canvas API renders Perlin/Simplex noise. Web Workers handle computation to keep UI responsive.

playgroundItems.title: Portrait Photography
playgroundItems.description: Studio portrait series exploring lighting and composition.
playgroundItems.details: Shot with artificial lighting setup including key light, fill, and rim light. Post-processing in Capture One and Photoshop for color grading and retouching.

playgroundItems.title: 3D Card Hover
playgroundItems.description: Interactive 3D card that tilts based on mouse position.
playgroundItems.details: Mouse position is tracked and converted to rotation angles. CSS transform-style: preserve-3d creates depth.

playgroundItems.title: Urban Exploration
playgroundItems.details: Street photography capturing architectural elements and urban life. Shot on location in various cities with emphasis on geometric compositions and natural light.

playgroundItems.title: Kinetic Type
playgroundItems.details: Exploration of animated typography with rhythmic motion. Uses expression-based timing and custom easing curves for organic movement.

playgroundItems.title: Typewriter Effect
playgroundItems.description: Customizable typewriter effect with cursor animation.
playgroundItems.details: Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth character rendering. CSS custom properties control typing speed and cursor blink rate.

playgroundItems.title: This Portfolio
playgroundItems.description: My personal portfolio website built with modern web technologies.
playgroundItems.details: Features a creative design with 3D elements, smooth animations, and a distinctive visual style. Built using SolidJS for reactivity, Three.js for 3D graphics, and deployed on Cloudflare Pages.

playgroundItems.title: React Component Library
playgroundItems.description: A collection of reusable React components with documentation.
playgroundItems.details: Modular component library with comprehensive Storybook documentation, TypeScript support, and accessibility built-in. Publishable to npm with proper versioning.
